name: Good Neighbor Szechuan Noodles
recipeInstructions:
Any thin, flat noodle can be substituted for Oriental
noodles.
Good Neighbor uses vegetarian chicken-flavored broth powder.
Cook noodles according to package directions; drain and cool.
Combine tamari, vinegar, chili paste, tahini, sesame oil, and broth in a bowl; set aside.
Heat 2 tbsp oil in a wok. Add noodles; toss until warm and lightly browned. Add bean sprouts and spinach; mix well.
Add sauce mixture; toss gently to coat. Serve while hot.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
